serverInfo.name: frugal
serverInfo.title: Frugal
serverInfo.description: Cost-arbitrage MCP server. Routes every agent tool call to the cheapest provider that returns a result. Free / local first, paid as fallback. BYOK, no SaaS, no account.

streamable_http.note: Operators self-host: `frugal mcp serve --http :8765`. Bearer auth via FRUGAL_AUTH_TOKEN; rate limit + per-request timeout configurable.

install.notes: Single Go binary (~10 MB). Auto-detects Claude Desktop, Cursor, Claude Code and merges the MCP config in. No SaaS or account.

tools.name: frugal__search
tools.description: Routed web search. Cheapest configured provider wins; falls through on transient error.

tools.name: frugal__extract
tools.description: Page → clean markdown/text/HTML. Local go-readability first, Firecrawl as paid fallback for JS-rendered pages.

tools.name: frugal__browse
tools.description: Headless JS rendering. Use when frugal__extract returns 'page likely requires JS'.
